ai_summary: Lemon Tree Hotels announced a net reduction of 42 managed rooms due to the de-flagging of its 112-room Dubai hotel, partially offset by signing a new 70-room property in Jorhat, Assam. While the Jorhat signing signifies strategic domestic expansion in Northeast India, the unexplained exit from Dubai represents a material, negative impact on their international presence and overall managed room count. This dual move suggests a strategic pivot in portfolio focus or unstated operational challenges abroad, warranting further clarity for investors.
